lessons.title: Multilevel Reading Part 4: Multiple choice questions

title: A1 level lessons / Beginner and elementary
description:
Beginner and Elementary English Course

This course is designed for beginners who want to start learning English from the basics and gradually progress to the Elementary level.

In this course, you will learn:
The English alphabet and pronunciation
The verb “to be”
Affirmative, negative, and question forms of “to be”
Have got / Has got
The Present Simple Tense
Present Simple negative sentences
Present Simple question forms
The Present Continuous Tense
Present Continuous negative sentences
Present Continuous question forms
The difference between the Present Simple and Present Continuous
The Past Simple Tense
Regular and irregular verbs in the past tense
Past Simple negative sentences
Past Simple question forms
Basic sentence structure
Everyday vocabulary and common expressions

By the end of the course, you will be able to build basic English sentences, ask and answer simple questions, talk about daily routines, describe actions happening now, and discuss past events with greater confidence.
